zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonathan Burt於1625年1月23日在英國戴文哈波頓受洗時，他的父親Henry Burt25歲，母親Eulalia Marche26歲。他於1651年10月20日與Elizabeth Lobdell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1661年住在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。他於1657年在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德被列為selectman。他去世於1715年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年90歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonathan Burt于1625年1月23日在英国戴文哈波頓受洗时，他的父亲Henry Burt25岁，母亲Eulalia Marche26岁。他于1651年10月20日与Elizabeth Lobdell在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1661年住在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。他于1657年在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德被列为selectman。他去世于1715年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年90岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Burt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Birt
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places in the Rhineland named Birth or Birten.
In some cases also Croatian: occupational name from birt ‘inn-keeper’, a regional or colloquial word of German origin (see Wirt ).

nameMeanings.name: Jonathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathan
meanings: Respelling of   Jonathan  , as if a combination of   John   and   Nathan .

variants.name: Jonathon
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Jonathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathon
meanings: Mainly U.S.: respelled form of   Jonathan  , influenced by   John .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonathan Burt was christened on 23 January 1625, in Harberton, Devon, England, his father, Henry Burt, was 25 and his mother, Eulalia Marche, was 26. He married Elizabeth Lobdell on 20 October 1651, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States in 1661. In 1657, his occupation is listed as selectman in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States. He died on 19 October 1715, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 90, and was buried in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonathan Burt a été baptisé le 23 janvier 1625, à Harberton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry Burt, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eulalia Marche, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lobdell le 20 octobre 1651, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1661. En 1657, sa profession de son indiquée est selectman à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 19 octobre 1715, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonathan Burt am 23. Januar 1625 in Harberton, Devon, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Henry Burt 25 und seine Mutter Eulalia Marche 26. Er hat am 20. Oktober 1651 in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Lobdell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1661 hat er in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. 1657 ist sein Beruf als selectman in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. Oktober 1715 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Burt è stato battezzato il 23 gennaio 1625 nel Harberton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Henry Burt, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eulalia Marche, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lobdell il 20 ottobre 1651, nel Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1661. Nel 1657, la sua occupazione è indicata come selectman nel Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 19 ottobre 1715, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonathan Burtが1625年1月23日にイギリスデボンハーバートンで洗礼を受けた時，父Henry Burtは25歳，母Eulalia Marcheは26歳であった。1651年10月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでElizabeth Lobdellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドに住んでいた。1657年，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドでの職業はselectmanと記録されている。彼は1715年10月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで90歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드

ko.Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드
ko.lifeSummary: Jonathan Burt(이)가 1625년 1월 23일 영국 데폰 하르버턴에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Burt(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eulalia Marche(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1651년 10월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 Elizabeth Lobdell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1661년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에서 살았다. 1657년, 그의 직업은 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에서 selectman이었다. 그는 1715년 10월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Burt foi batizado em 23 de janeiro de 1625, em Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Burt, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eulalia Marche, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Lobdell em 20 de outubro de 1651, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1661. Em 1657, sua profissão aparece como selectman em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1715, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonathan Burt был крещен 23 января 1625 г. в местности харбиртон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Burt было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eulalia Marche, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lobdell 20 октября 1651 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1661 году. В 1657 году он работал по профессии selectman в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 19 октября 1715 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonathan Burt se bautizó el 23 de enero de 1625, en Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Burt, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eulalia Marche, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Lobdell el 20 de octubre de 1651, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1661. En 1657, su ocupación registrada era selectman en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1715, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
